channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran hangs another man as executions increase during war
item.description: Since the start of the war, Iran has ramped up executions, particularly in cases involving alleged espionage or security-related charges.

item.title: What to know about Trump-Xi summit with trade, Taiwan and Iran on the agenda
item.description: Presidents Xi Jinping and Donald Trump are preparing for a summit, with both China and the U.S. emphasizing stable ties

item.title: What we know about hantavirus cases tied to deadly cruise ship outbreak
item.description: Health officials have identified at least 11 confirmed or suspected cases of hantavirus tied to an outbreak on the M/V Hondius cruise ship.

item.title: Supreme Court halts order for Alabama to use House map with 2 largely Black districts
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court has set the stage for Alabama to get rid of one of two largely Black congressional districts before this year’s midterm electio...
